name: example-go
documentation: # example_go

modules.name: example_go.example_go
documentation: python wrapper for package example_go within overall package example_go
This is what you import to use the package.
File is generated by gopy. Do not edit.
gopy pkg -output=dist -vm=python3 example_go
the following is required to enable dlopen to open the _go.so file

functions.name: example_go.example_go.Add
documentation: Add(int a, int b) int
to use this code in your end-user python file, import it as follows:
from example_go import example_go
and then refer to everything using example_go. prefix
packages imported by this package listed below:
